why.title: Why Choose Terratech
why.subtitle: We don't just sell equipment — we provide complete project support
why.r1_desc: Over 50 completed projects in 6 countries. Deep knowledge of Central Asian and Caucasus markets.
why.r2_desc: Reliable logistics to Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan, Georgia, Azerbaijan, Armenia and Lithuania.
why.r3_desc: We help select the optimal solution for your project requirements and budget.
why.r4_desc: Only certified equipment directly from manufacturers.
why.r5_desc: From equipment selection and design to assembly and commissioning.
why.r6_desc: Direct manufacturer contracts allow us to offer balanced, competitive prices.
